from dataclasses import dataclass
from flask import Flask, jsonify

app = Flask(__name__)
app.config["MAX_PAGE_SIZE"] = 100
app.config["FEATURE_V2"] = True
app.config["API_TIMEOUT"] = 30


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class AppSettings:
    max_page_size: int
    feature_v2: bool
    api_timeout: int


def load_settings() -> AppSettings:
    return AppSettings(
        max_page_size=app.config["MAX_PAGE_SIZE"],
        feature_v2=app.config["FEATURE_V2"],
        api_timeout=app.config["API_TIMEOUT"],
    )


settings = load_settings()


@app.route("/users")
def list_users():
    users = db.fetch_users(limit=settings.max_page_size)
    return jsonify(users)


@app.route("/products")
def list_products():
    products = catalog.fetch(limit=settings.max_page_size, timeout=settings.api_timeout)
    return jsonify(products)


@app.route("/dashboard")
def dashboard():
    if settings.feature_v2:
        return render_v2_dashboard()
    return render_v1_dashboard()


@app.route("/reports")
def reports():
    return generate_report(settings.max_page_size, settings.feature_v2, settings.api_timeout)
